mapper.select: SELECT CASE COUNT(*) WHEN 0 THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT TIMESTAMP,'YYMMDD') || '000001' ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(MAX(SEQNO)) + 1) END AS SEQ_NO FROM NON_FACE_TBL WHERE SEQNO LIKE SUBSTR(#{seqNo}, 3, 6)||'%' WITH UR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NON_FACE_TBL ( SEQNO, APPLY_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, ACCT_NO, BANK_NAME, ANOTHER_ACCTNO, DEPOSIT, INVEST, PROPERTY, ASSETS, ASSETS_FLAG, MORTGAGE, LOAN, DEBT, DETB_FLAG, PSNO, CUSNM, REQBRCD, REQBRNM, AGTYN, JOBTYPECD, PASS_CODE, PHONE, REGISTER_DATE, BUSINESS_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seqNo}, #{applyId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{acctNo}, #{bankName}, #{anotherAcctNo}, #{deposit}, #{invest}, #{property}, #{assets}, #{assetsFlag}, #{mortgage}, #{loan}, #{debt}, #{detbFlag}, #{psno}, #{cusNm}, #{reqBrCd}, #{reqBrNm}, #{agtYn}, #{jobTypeCd}, #{passCode}, #{phone}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, #{businessDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT SEQNO, APPLY_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, ACCT_NO, BANK_NAME, ANOTHER_ACCTNO, DEPOSIT, INVEST, PROPERTY, ASSETS, ASSETS_FLAG, MORTGAGE, LOAN, DEBT, DETB_FLAG, IDCDDSCD, PSNO, CUSNM, IDCDISUDT, OPLICNO, REQBRCD, REQBRNM, AGTYN, JOBTYPECD, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, SENDYN, PASS_CODE, TO_CHAR(REGISTER_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS REGISTER_DATE, IMG_SENDDATE, IMGIDXNO, IDCARD_DATE, PHONE, ERRMSG, BUSINESS_DATE, PSSPRT_NO, MRTS_NO FROM NON_FACE_TBL WHERE PSNO = #{psNo} AND PASS_CODE = #{passCode} AND SEQNO = #{seqNo} WITH UR
